name: agentic-gaskit
description: Open-source toolkit for IOTA gas sponsorship plus agent-safe wallets, manifests, policy controls, receipts, and integrations.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/shared-types && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/manifest && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/policy-gateway && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/receipts && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/sdk && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/mcp-server && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/accounts && npm run build -w @iota-gaskit/policy-gateway-service
scripts.test: npm run build && node --import tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts examples/**/*.test.ts packages/*/src/*.test.ts apps/*/src/*.test.ts
scripts.verify:local: npm test && npm run contracts:test && npm run typecheck && npm run smoke:local && npm run smoke:demo-dapp && npm run smoke:demo-browser && npm run readiness:testnet:example && npm run pack:check && npm run docs:check && npm run secrets:scan
